headline: Deal Dispatch: Authentic Brands Acquires Care Bears, Kroger Buys Giant Eagle, Dish Corp. Bankruptcy
summary: Major M&A deals this week include Rocket Lab grabs Iridium Communications for $8 billion, Aspen buys Kartos Therapeutics, KKR buys EDF Power.
